name: io.github.vitas/evidra
title: Evidra
description: Evidra — Behavioral reliability for infrastructure automation.

environmentVariables.name: EVIDRA_SIGNING_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Signing mode: strict (default) or optional (ephemeral local mode)

environmentVariables.name: EVIDRA_SIGNING_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 private key (required for strict mode)

environmentVariables.name: EVIDRA_SIGNING_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to PEM-encoded Ed25519 private key (required for strict mode if key not inline)
